differences.title: 1. CORE LIBRARY
differences.leftDesc: Leverages React's component model for building UIs efficiently.
differences.rightDesc: Built on Vue.js, offering a progressive and flexible approach.

differences.title: 2. FILE-BASED ROUTING
differences.leftDesc: Automatic routing based on file system structure in 'pages'.
differences.rightDesc: Automatic routing based on file system structure in 'pages'.

differences.title: 3. DATA FETCHING
differences.leftDesc: Supports multiple data fetching methods, including Server Components.
differences.rightDesc: Offers various fetching strategies like asyncData and fetch.

differences.title: 4. CSS SUPPORT
differences.leftDesc: Built-in support for CSS Modules, Styled JSX, and Tailwind.
differences.rightDesc: Supports SCSS, PostCSS, CSS Modules, and styled-components.

differences.title: 5. SERVER-SIDE RENDERING
differences.leftDesc: Offers robust SSR, SSG, and Incremental Static Regeneration.
differences.rightDesc: Provides server-side rendering and static site generation capabilities.

differences.title: 6. DEPLOYMENT OPTIONS
differences.leftDesc: Deployable on Vercel, Netlify, Node.js servers, and more.
differences.rightDesc: Deployable on Vercel, Netlify, Node.js servers, and cloud platforms.

differences.title: 7. COMMUNITY & ECOSYSTEM
differences.leftDesc: Backed by Vercel, with a vast React ecosystem.
differences.rightDesc: Strong Vue.js community and a rich set of modules.
